title: Pipeline Sync — GHL to MyCase
summary: Pushes GoHighLevel stage updates back into MyCase so both systems stay aligned in both directions.
businessOutcome: Let teams work in either platform without losing process accuracy or needing duplicate updates.
thumbnail: GoHighLevel stage changes flow back to case records.
problem: If only one side of a sync is automated, teams still end up reconciling statuses by hand.
solution: This workflow detects GoHighLevel stage changes, updates contact fields, and fires downstream automation to keep MyCase in step.
workflowOverview: Listens for opportunity stage changes in GHL
